title: Triangle Type

content.problemStatement:
Take the sides of a triangle as user inputs and find if the triangle is equilateral, isosceles, or scalene.

**Note:** 

Equilateral Triangle: If all three sides of the triangle are equal, it is an equilateral triangle.

Isosceles Triangle: If at least two sides of the triangle are equal, it is an isosceles triangle.

Scalene Triangle: If all three sides of the triangle are different, it is a scalene triangle.


Input Format

The only line of input will contain three space separated numbers - The sides of a triangle.


Output Format

Output on a single line:

**Equilateral**, if the triangle is equilateral.
**Isosceles**, if the triangle is isosceles.
**Scalene**, if the triangle is scalene.
constraints: a + b > c, a + c > b, b + c > a
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains three space‑separated integers a, b and c denoting the lengths of the sides of a triangle.
content.outputFormat: For each test case print on a separate line one word: Equilateral, Isosceles or Scalene, according to the type of the triangle.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Test case 1: sides 2,3,2 have two equal sides → Isosceles.
Test case 2: 3,4,5 are all different → Scalene.
Test case 3: 4,4,4 are all equal → Equilateral.

First triangle 5,5,8 has two equal sides → Isosceles.
Second triangle 7,9,10 has all sides different → Scalene.
All three sides are 1, so the triangle is Equilateral.

hidden.label: stress case 4
hidden.expectedOutput:
Equilateral
Isosceles
Scalene
Isosceles
Scalene
Equilateral

solution.approach: The type of a triangle depends only on equality of its side lengths. For each test case we compare the three sides: if all three are equal the triangle is Equilateral; else if any two are equal it is Isosceles; otherwise it is Scalene. The checks are O(1) per test case.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) overall, O(1) per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) besides the input and output buffers.

code.Java: import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args)throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());int T=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();for(int i=0;i<T;i++){st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());int a=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int b=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());int c=Integer.parseInt(st.nextToken());if(a==b && b==c) sb.append("Equilateral");else if(a==b || b==c || a==c) sb.append("Isosceles");else sb.append("Scalene");if(i<T-1) sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
